metaDescription: [→ Replace: one sentence describing the project and its key outcome for SEO.]

image.alt: [→ Replace: descriptive alt text for the hero image]

blocks.html: [→ Replace: 2–3 sentences on the company, the product, and why design consistency was a business priority. Example: Acme Corp is a B2B SaaS company with 12 product teams shipping independently. After three years of growth, the product had accumulated four distinct visual languages and no shared component library.]

[→ Replace: Describe your role and scope. Example: I led the design system effort from audit through adoption — defining token architecture, building the core component set in Figma, and working with engineering to ship a Storybook-backed React library.]
"[→ Replace: A striking quantitative fact or a memorable quote from a stakeholder that frames the problem.]"
[→ Replace: Describe the design and engineering pain caused by the lack of a system. What was the cost — in time, quality, or consistency — of operating without one?]
[→ Replace: List the specific failure modes. What broke down at handoff? Where did inconsistency surface for users?]
[→ Replace: Describe your process — audit, token architecture, component prioritisation, contribution model. What governed the decisions about what went into v1 vs later?]

blocks.text: [Step or phase name — e.g. Audit & inventory]

blocks.html: [→ Replace: What did you audit? How many components, how many variants, how many inconsistencies did you find?]

slides.alt: [→ Replace: e.g. Figma component library overview]

blocks.text: [Step or phase name — e.g. Token architecture]

blocks.html: [→ Replace: How did you structure design tokens? Primitive → semantic → component levels? How were they synced between Figma and code?]
[→ Replace: Walk through 2–3 components that were particularly complex or illustrative of your decision-making. What were the constraints, variants, and accessibility requirements?]

blocks.alt: [→ Replace: e.g. Form field component — all states and variants]

blocks.html: [→ Replace: How was impact measured? Over what time period? What baseline are the numbers compared against?]

items.label: [→ Replace: metric — e.g. Components in the library]

[→ Replace: metric — e.g. Reduction in UI inconsistency reports]

[→ Replace: What was the most surprising or counterintuitive thing you learned? What would you do differently?]
[→ Replace: What advice would you give to a designer starting a design system from scratch based on this experience?]
"[→ Replace: A closing insight or principle that crystallises what you learned — make it quotable.]"
